name: opentofu-secure
description: Hardened AWS toolkit: generate OpenTofu/Terraform config from security-baked templates (S3 native-lock state, least-privilege IAM/GitLab-OIDC, KMS, mandatory tagging, OIDC CI), plus a report-only drift & cost loop that audits those same guardrails. WAF/SecurityHub/GuardDuty excluded on cost grounds.
version_status: frozen — versioning moved to marketplace level
